name: Company Name
description: Display name used in search, portfolio and map panels.

name: Primary Ticker
description: Main local ticker or provider symbol.

name: Instrument Type
description: Equity, ETF, ADR, REIT, bond or other instrument type.

name: Listing Status
description: Active, suspended, delisted or planned status.

name: IPO Date
description: Initial public offering or first listing date.

name: Company Age
description: Age of the business or public listing.

name: Exchange Currency
description: Default trading currency for the listing.

name: Provider Symbol
description: Ticker in a specific data provider.

name: Market Segment
description: Main market, growth market, ETF segment or other segment.

name: Headquarters Region
description: Region, state or voivodeship of headquarters.

name: Operating Countries Count
description: Number of countries where the company operates.

name: Main Operating Country ISO
description: Main operating country when different from headquarters.

name: Revenue Country Concentration
description: Share of revenue from the largest country.

name: Business Model Type
description: Manufacturer, platform, bank, insurer, SaaS, commodity producer or similar model.

name: Revenue Model
description: Subscription, transaction, commission, interest, unit sale or mixed revenue model.

name: Cyclicality Score
description: Sensitivity of the business to the economic cycle.

name: Operating Leverage Score
description: Sensitivity of profit to revenue changes.

name: Regulation Intensity Score
description: Exposure to regulated sectors or state policy.

name: Profit Per Employee
description: Net income divided by employee count.

name: Enterprise Value
description: Market cap plus debt minus cash.

name: EBITDA
description: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization.

name: Net Income
description: Net profit attributable to shareholders where available.

name: FCF Margin
description: Free cash flow divided by revenue.

name: Return on Equity
description: Net income divided by average equity.

name: Return on Assets
description: Net income divided by average assets.

name: Cash Conversion Cycle
description: Inventory days plus receivable days minus payable days.

name: Interest Coverage
description: EBIT or EBITDA divided by interest expense.

name: Current Ratio
description: Current assets divided by current liabilities.

name: Quick Ratio
description: Liquid current assets divided by current liabilities.

name: FCF Yield
description: Free cash flow divided by market capitalization.

name: Dividend Yield
description: Dividend per share divided by price.

name: Largest Shareholder Percent
description: Ownership share of the largest shareholder.

name: Insider Ownership Percent
description: Share owned by insiders or management.

name: State Ownership Percent
description: Share owned by government or state entities.

name: Free Float Market Cap
description: Market capitalization adjusted for free float.

name: Founder Led
description: Whether the company is led by a founder.

name: Payout Ratio
description: Dividend divided by earnings or free cash flow.

name: Map Market Cap Bucket
description: Micro, small, mid, large or mega cap bucket.

name: Map Risk Bucket
description: Risk bucket for visual map layer.

name: Map Alpha Bucket
description: Future Edge Engine score bucket for map layer.

name: Map Data Quality Score
description: Data completeness and reliability score for instrument map.
